name: uMusic
subtitle: Private YouTube Music client for iOS
description: Unofficial, unaffiliated YouTube Music client. Built for a small circle; no public support. Install requires SideStore or AltStore.

apps.name: uMusic
apps.versionDescription:
fix(ci): use fetch-depth: 0 instead of fetch-tags: true to get annotated tags

fetch-tags: true with --depth=1 conflicts on annotated tag pushes: actions/
checkout maps GITHUB_SHA (the commit) to refs/tags/vX.Y.Z at the same time
fetch-tags tries to store the tag object there — git exits 128. A full clone
avoids the shallow refspec collision and still delivers %(contents) for notes.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
apps.localizedDescription: Third-party YouTube Music client — playback, library, downloads, offline playlists, lyrics. Sign in with your YouTube Music account; nothing leaves your device.

permissions.usageDescription: Keep music playing while you use other apps or lock your phone.
Stream from YouTube Music and fetch artwork.

versions.localizedDescription:
fix(ci): use fetch-depth: 0 instead of fetch-tags: true to get annotated tags

fetch-tags: true with --depth=1 conflicts on annotated tag pushes: actions/
checkout maps GITHUB_SHA (the commit) to refs/tags/vX.Y.Z at the same time
fetch-tags tries to store the tag object there — git exits 128. A full clone

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

v0.1.12 — Header polish + library/search hardening

Header
• Tap the uMusic logo from any tab to jump back to Home.
• A new now-playing badge between the wordmark and the gear re-opens the player when minimized.
• Pull-to-refresh on Home confirms with a "Refreshed" toast.

Library
• Downloads collapses to a single tile.
• Tighter, uniform shortcut rows across Recently played / Liked / Downloads / Saved albums / Saved playlists.
• Saved albums and saved playlists are surfaced from the Library tab.

Search
• Artist routing fixed (entities classified by pageType, not subtitle text).
• Songs shelf only — Top result / Videos / Episodes no longer leak unplayable music-video IDs into search results.

Playback
• Stuck-track auto-skip — silently advances when a stream fails to start within 4s.
• Mix playlists (RDAMVM / RDEM / RDAO / RDTMAK / RDPN / RDAT …) routed through /next so personal "My Mix" entries return their tracks instead of an empty list.
• Verbose-log toggle in Settings for capturing playback failures on release builds.

Tabs & UI
• Tabs preserve scroll + navigation state across switches (Home half-scrolled → Explore → back to Home no longer resets).
• Thumbnails: stable sizing across shelves; automatic ytimg fallback when YT's signed CDN URLs expire mid-session.

Tooling
• pbxproj identity leaks (DEVELOPMENT_TEAM, non-canonical bundle ID) stripped.
• CI guard fails any future PR that re-introduces them.
